CustomField.description: Min date between the CES Survey Send Date on the Account, SaaS Primary Contact, and the Billing Primary Contact.
CustomField.formula: IF( AND( ISBLANK(CES_Survey_1st_Sent_to_Primary_Contacts__c), ISBLANK(Account__r.CES_Survey_Send_Date__c) ), NULL, IF( AND( ISBLANK(CES_Survey_1st_Sent_to_Primary_Contacts__c), NOT(ISBLANK(Account__r.CES_Survey_Send_Date__c)) ), Account__r.CES_Survey_Send_Date__c, IF( AND( ISBLANK(Account__r.CES_Survey_Send_Date__c), NOT(ISBLANK(CES_Survey_1st_Sent_to_Primary_Contacts__c)) ), CES_Survey_1st_Sent_to_Primary_Contacts__c, DATE(1900, 01, 01) + MIN( BLANKVALUE(CES_Survey_1st_Sent_to_Primary_Contacts__c, DATE(1900, 01, 01)) - DATE(1900, 01, 01), BLANKVALUE(Account__r.CES_Survey_Send_Date__c, DATE(1900, 01, 01)) - DATE(1900, 01, 01) ) )))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Min date between the CES Survey Send Date on the Account, SaaS Primary Contact, and the Billing Primary Contact.
CustomField.label: CES Survey First Sent Date
